# Forever AI Components

> 600+ zero-dependency, self-contained animated web components (single HTML files).
> Every component is one file: inline CSS + JS, no frameworks, works offline by double-click.
> Free to browse and download. Original works inspired by artistic styles, see https://raw.githubusercontent.com/isas1/forever-ai-components/main/NOTICE.md.

Home (browse, star, contribute): https://github.com/isas1/forever-ai-components
Live visual canvas (humans): https://forever-components.vercel.app/infinite/
Pro (paid packs for businesses — the free library stays free): https://forever-components.vercel.app/pro/

## For agents (three lean surfaces)

1. Filter vocab (tiny): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/isas1/forever-ai-components/main/infinite/facets.json
   The facets you can filter on and their values/counts. Fetch this first to learn the schema.
2. Discovery index (lean): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/isas1/forever-ai-components/main/infinite/components.index.json
   One record per component: title, description, file path, and discovery facets
   (role, technique, style, motion, intensity, interaction, perfTier, scheme, deps, useCases, mood, a11y). No heavy prose, so it stays small. Filter it with CODE (do not paste the whole
   file into a model context). Each record has `file` (e.g. `van-gogh/01-starry-flow.html`).
3. Component source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/isas1/forever-ai-components/main/infinite/<file>
   GET the chosen tile for the complete, copy-pasteable component. Adaptation detail
   (useWhen, avoidWhen, agentPrompt, editableAreas, preserveElements, knownLimitations) travels
   INSIDE the tile as <script type="application/json" id="forever-agent-meta">, so one fetch
   returns code + instructions together.

- Machine manifest: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/isas1/forever-ai-components/main/agents.json
- Sitemap: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/isas1/forever-ai-components/main/sitemap.xml

## Use

Fetch facets.json, then the lean components.index.json, filter by facet in code
(e.g. role=loader, perfTier=cheap) to a shortlist, then GET only the chosen tile URL. Read its
embedded forever-agent-meta block for adaptation guidance. No build step, no dependencies.
